title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
company: Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Senior Software Engineer - Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Software Engineer based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Implement new features based on product requirements
• Contribute to system architecture and technical design decisions
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Integrate third-party APIs and services

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in TensorFlow
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in Rust

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Consultancy Services Consulting Pvt Ltd!
